title: Botanical garden's nursery hosts spring plant sale
description: LIFESTYLE NEWS - The Garden Route Indigenous...
bodyText:
LIFESTYLE NEWS - The Garden Route Indigenous Nursery at the Garden Route Botanical Garden in George is celebrating spring with a colourful plant sale from Friday to Sunday, 5 to 7 September.


> Shoppers may look forward to discounts of up to 20% on a wide variety of selected plants, making it the perfect opportunity to brighten their gardens after the winter months.


The sale kicks off on Friday from 08:00 to 17:00, continues on Saturday from 08:00 to 14:00, and concludes on Sunday from 10:00 to 14:00.

Located at 49 Caledon Street, the nursery specialises in indigenous plants well suited to local conditions. With expert advice on hand and a vibrant display of spring favourites, the event is for seasoned gardeners and newcomers who want to bring fresh life into their gardens.

Visitors are encouraged to choose from a wide range of indigenous trees, shrubs, fynbos and more, and grow a garden that makes a difference.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
